zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fowler III於1320年9月出生在英國英格蘭波克夏史利文哈姆時，他的父親John Fowler II25歲，母親Isabell de Foxley24歲。他於1326年與Matilda Brocas在英國素可瓦布萊頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國哈普爾素坦普頓被列為constable of southampton castle。他去世於1361年4月23日在英國英格蘭波克夏享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏史利文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fowler III于1320年9月出生在英国英格兰波克夏史利文哈姆时，他的父亲John Fowler II25岁，母亲Isabell de Foxley24岁。他于1326年与Matilda Brocas在英国素可瓦布萊頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国哈普爾素坦普頓被列为constable of southampton castle。他去世于1361年4月23日在英国英格兰波克夏享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏史利文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fowler III was born in September 1320, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fowler II, was 25 and his mother, Isabell de Foxley, was 24. He married Matilda Brocas in 1326, in Warbleton, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as constable of southampton castle in Southampton, Hampshire, England. He died on 23 April 1361, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fowler III est né en septembre 1320, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fowler II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabell de Foxley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Brocas en 1326, à Warbleton, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of southampton castle à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1361, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fowler III im September 1320 in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fowler II 25 und seine Mutter Isabell de Foxley 24. Er hat 1326 in Warbleton, Sussex, England Matilda Brocas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable of southampton castle in Southampton, Hampshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. April 1361 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fowler III è nato il nel settembre 1320 nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fowler II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabell de Foxley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Brocas nel 1326, nel Warbleton, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of southampton castle nel Southampton, Hampshire, England. Morì il 23 aprile 1361, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fowler IIIが1320年9月にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムで生まれた時，父John Fowler IIは25歳，母Isabell de Foxleyは24歳であった。1326年にイギリススセックスワーブレトンでMatilda Brocasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンでの職業はconstable of southampton castleと記録されている。彼は1361年4月23日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fowler III(이)가 1320년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fowler II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell de Foxley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1326년 영국 수세스 워블레턴에서 Matilda Brocas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 constable of southampton castle이었다. 그는 1361년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 슈라이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fowler III nasceu em setembro de 1320, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fowler II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabell de Foxley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Brocas em 1326, em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como constable of southampton castle em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1361, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fowler III родился сентябрь 1320 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fowler II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell de Foxley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Brocas в 1326 г. в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии constable of southampton castle в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия. Он умер 23 апреля 1361 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fowler III nació en septiembre de 1320, en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Fowler II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabell de Foxley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda Brocas en 1326, en Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era constable of southampton castle en Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 23 de abril de 1361, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
